overview.description: AI-powered virtual patient platform for training healthcare professionals in difficult communication
overview.description_long: ComGuide creates a global platform where healthcare professionals can practice difficult conversations with virtual patients. The virtual patients respond with realistic emotions and behaviors powered by AI. ComGuide designs training tailored to real-life scenarios for Czech hospitals, medical faculties, and international healthcare institutions. Supported by Erasmus+ and Czech Rise Up grants. Clients include 13 Czech hospitals, 5 medical faculties, and 1,300+ trained healthcare professionals.
overview.tagline: We are changing communication in healthcare. We teach healthcare professionals to act in ways that benefit both themselves and their patients.

history.origin_story: Founded by Jan Hrdlička (biomedical engineering, AI & biocybernetics, CTU FEL; previously co-founded 3dsense), Lucie Hrdličková (pediatric oncologist, palliative care expert, FN Motol), and Jiří Wild (PhD in biomedical engineering, AI & biocybernetics, CTU FEL; previously co-led 3dsense).

key_milestones.event: Received Erasmus+ grant for VR communication training with minorities (2021-2-CZ01-KA210-VET-000049487)
Received Erasmus+ VR-TALKS grant for introducing VR into medical school curricula (2023-1-CZ01-KA220-HED-000155071)
Platform serving 13 Czech hospitals, 5 medical faculties, and 1,300+ trained healthcare professionals

notable_people.name: Claudia Bausewein
notable_people.role: Advisor / Professor of Palliative Medicine, LMU University Hospital Munich

notable_people.name: Juliet Jacobsen
notable_people.role: Advisor / Associate Professor, Harvard Medical School

notable_people.name: Kateřina Rusinová
notable_people.role: Advisor / Associate Professor, Charles University Prague

metadata.notes: ComGuide is a small, grant-funded AI startup focused on healthcare communication training via virtual patients. The website (comguide.cz) is a single-page app in Czech/English/German. Stats from website: 13 Czech hospitals, 5 medical faculties, 1,300+ trained healthcare professionals. Contact: Jan Hrdlička, HRDLICKA@COMGUIDE.CZ, +420 608 653 234. Founding year not confirmed — Erasmus+ grant references from 2021 suggest company existed by then. No CNAIP URL available.

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Domain-specific focus (speech) with proprietary tech or established customer base provides moat against foundation model commoditization.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Small team with no visible customer traction or market validation signals.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No known funding and very small team. High dependency on bootstrapped revenue or future fundraising.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Mixed risk profile — some protective factors but also significant vulnerabilities.
